2603.16500.title: From the Inside Out: Progressive Distribution Refinement for Confidence Calibration
2603.16500.paper_summary: Leveraging the model's internal information as the self-reward signal in Reinforcement Learning (RL) has received extensive attention due to its label-free nature. While prior works have made significant progress in applying the Test-Time Scaling (TTS) strategies to RL, the discrepancy in internal information between test and training remains inadequately addressed. Moreover, Test-Time Training based on voting-based TTS strategies often suffers from reward hacking problems. To address these issues, we propose DistriTTRL, which leverages the distribution prior of the model's confidence during RL to progressively optimize the reward signal, rather than relying solely on single-query rollouts. Additionally, we mitigate the phenomenon of consistent reward hacking caused by the voting-based TTS strategies through diversity-targeted penalties. Benefiting from this training mechanism where model capability and self-reward signals complement each other, and the mitigation of reward hacking, DistriTTRL has achieved significant performance improvements across multiple models and benchmarks.
2603.16500.paper_summary_zh: 利用模型內部資訊作為強化學習 (RL) 中的自我獎勵信號，由於其無需標籤的特性，已受到廣泛關注。雖然先前的研究在將測試時間縮放 (TTS) 策略應用於 RL 方面取得了顯著進展，但測試和訓練之間的內部資訊差異仍然未得到充分解決。此外，基於投票的 TTS 策略的測試時間訓練常常面臨獎勵駭客問題。為了解決這些問題，我們提出了 DistriTTRL，該方法利用模型在 RL 過程中的信心分佈先驗，逐步優化獎勵信號，而不是僅依賴單次查詢的回合。此外，我們通過針對多樣性的懲罰來減輕由基於投票的 TTS 策略引起的一致獎勵駭客現象。得益於這種模型能力與自我獎勵信號相輔相成的訓練機制，以及對獎勵駭客的減輕，DistriTTRL 在多個模型和基準上取得了顯著的性能提升。
2603.16500.author: Xizhong Yang et.al.
2603.16500.authors: Xizhong Yang, Yinan Xia, Huiming Wang, Mofei Song
